Type Property# didFinishLaunching

iOS 26.0+iPadOS 26.0+Mac Catalyst 26.0+tvOS 26.0+visionOS 26.0+

```
static var didFinishLaunching: NotificationCenter.BaseMessageIdentifier<UIApplication.DidFinishLaunchingMessage> { get }
```

Available when `Self` is `NotificationCenter.BaseMessageIdentifier<UIApplication.DidFinishLaunchingMessage>`.## [See Also](/documentation/foundation/notificationcenter/messageidentifier/didfinishlaunching#see-also)
